title: IMPLEMENTING RULES AND REGULATIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11726, "AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE EDADES AND BERNAL CULTURAL CENTER AND MUSEUM IN DAGUPAN CITY, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, DEFINING ITS PURPOSES AND OBJECTIVES, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
120 OG No. 3, 427 (January 15, 2024)

[ IRR of REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11726, June 22, 2023 ]

IMPLEMENTING RULES AND REGULATIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11726, "AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE EDADES AND BERNAL CULTURAL CENTER AND MUSEUM IN DAGUPAN CITY, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, DEFINING ITS PURPOSES AND OBJECTIVES, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

RULE I

DECLARATION OF POLICY

SECTION 1.

Section 15, Article XIV of the 1987 Constitution affirms that Arts and Letters shall enjoy the patronage of the State. The State shall conserve, promote and popularize the nation's historical and cultural heritage and resources, as well as artistic creations.

SEC. 2.

To this end, it shall be declared the policy of the State to preserve the works of our national artists and acknowledge their significance in the nation's cultural heritage.

RULE II

ESTABLISHMENT AND PURPOSES OF

EDADES AND BERNAL CULTURAL CENTER AND MUSEUM

RULE II

ESTABLISHMENT AND PURPOSES OF

EDADES AND BERNAL CULTURAL CENTER AND MUSEUM

SEC. 3.

There is hereby established a cultural center and museum in Dagupan City, Province of Pangasinan, to be known as the "Edades and Bernal Cultural Center and Museum," hereinafter referred to as the "Center," in honor of the city's distinguished national artists, Victorio Edades and Salvador Bernal, with the general purpose and objective of presenting and promoting culture and the arts, as well as creative industries in the community. Towards this end, it shall:

a. Research, collect, conserve, interpret and exhibit the lives and artistic achievements of National Artists Victorio Edades and Salvador Bernal;

b. Promote and develop the local creative industries in Dagupan City, Province of Pangasinan and its immediate environs; and

c. Support the promotion and showcase of the Order of National Artists (ONA).

RULE III

MANAGEMENT OF EDADES AND BERNAL CULTURAL CENTER AND MUSEUM

c. Ensure the execution and publication of the MOA; and

d. Perform such other functions necessary for the effective implementation of this Act.

SEC. 4.1.

Stakeholder Participation.

To ensure the successful implementation of the Center's program, projects and activities, the Center shall undertake consultations with other national government agencies and other stakeholders, including, but not limited to, the Department of Education, Department of Tourism, Department of Environment and Natural Resources, National Museum of the Philippines, National Historical Commission of the Philippines, Cultural Center of the Philippines, National Archives of the Philippines, Komisyon sa Wikang Filipino, Film Development Council of the Philippines, National Book Development Board, National Council for Children's Television, Design Center of the Philippines, National Commission on Indigenous Peoples, Philippine Creative Industries Development Council, Higher Education Institutions, the descendants of National Artists Victorio Edades and Salvador Bernal, and other national, regional, and local associations with proven and established track record in the promotion of culture and the arts that may be recommended by the City Government of Dagupan.

RULE IV

SITE, MAIN VENUE AND ANCILLARY OFFICES

RULE IV

SITE, MAIN VENUE AND ANCILLARY OFFICES

SEC. 5.

The City Government of Dagupan shall provide the land necessary for the construction or establishment, or both of the main venue and ancillary offices and facilities of the Center. For this purpose, with the power of the Local Government Units (LGUs) under Section 18 of Republic Act No. 7160, or the Local Government Code (LGC) of 1991, and Title II, Chapter 3 of the LGC, the Sangguniang Panlungsod (SP) of Dagupan City shall issue the necessary Resolution and Ordinance, granting the site, main venue and ancillary offices of the Center, within three months from the publication of the MOA, or within the earliest period allowable under the LGU's legislation rules, from the publication of the MOA.

RULE V

BUDGET

SEC. 6.

The amount necessary for the implementation of this Act shall be charged against the current year's budget of the NCCA (Proper). Thereafter, such amounts as may be necessary for its continued implementation shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

RULE VI

AMENDMENTS

RULE VI

AMENDMENTS

SEC. 7.

Amendments.

Any amendments to this IRR shall be approved by the NCCA Board of Commissioners, in coordination with the City Government of Dagupan, other concerned agencies of the government, and private stakeholders.

RULE VII

FINAL PROVISIONS

SEPARABILITY AND EFFECTIVITY CLAUSES

SEC. 8.

Separability Clause.

If any provision of this IRR is held invalid or unconstitutional, the other provisions not so declared shall remain in full force and effect.

SEC. 9.

Effectivity.

This IRR shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a national newspaper of general circulation.

APPROVED: JUNE 22, 2023

(SGD.) VICTORINO M. MANALO

Chair

National Commission for Culture and the Arts

Noted by:

(SGD.) BELEN T. FERNANDEZ

Mayor

City Government of Dagupan
